programme.title: 🌊 2.2m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
That 2.2m swell and cross-shore breeze will likely serve up a closeout sandwich with a side of chop today.
🌊 Swell: 2.2m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 2.0km/h E (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 5.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 2.2m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that wind and two-metre swell, Lagide's probably a washing machine today.
